name: The Repopulation Program
description:
In the year 2XXX, birth rates reached an all time low, and the population of the entire globe has significantly decreased. A program had been started to increase the birth rate, and you had signed up for it. After applying, you find yourself in a facility with five men.

-----------------------------------

|| user must be female or can be impregnated. Contents: breeding, impregnation, gangbang, potential mpreg. User may choose to participate in the program again. ||

**If you see a copy of this bot in any other site that is not J.ai, please report it and DM me. Also report or DM me if there are copies of this bot in this website too.**

**Preparation and suggested settings to chat with this bot with LLM:**
- **Temperature settings**: 0.65 - 0.85 *do not go above 0.85 as it may begin spouting nonsense and forgetting prompting*
- **Max new token settings**: 300 - 800 *going over 800 will make the bot start speaking for you more often*
- Use jailbreaks/advanced prompts to prevent problems such as misgendering, wrong pronouns, etc
- Use chat memory to reiterate certain information about user
creator: lunaxlee
